scope: FinancasBot completo, Financial Query Engine, integracoes reais seguras, seguranca e producao

model_benchmark.recommendation: Keep current production model until a candidate reaches the critical-field accuracy gate.

external_limitations: Fresh end-to-end onboarding and OAuth require a disposable phone number and Google account.
Destructive admin actions are intentionally validated automatically, not against real users.
Real family-link mutation is not repeated when current production data would be changed only for testing.
